overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character in western attire walking along a riverside dock and shoreline. The character descends from wooden dock platforms to the water's edge, walking through shallow water along a debris-strewn beach toward a populated dock area with workers.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated wooden dock platform above river

events.description: character steps off wooden dock planks onto muddy shoreline

agents.ego_description: walking down the sloped wooden dock ramp toward the water's edge

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming the elevated dock walkway
large steam-powered riverboat with tall smokestacks docked in the water
large brick industrial building with smokestack in the background
wooden telegraph or electrical poles lining the dock area
stacked wooden crates and barriers along the dock edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an elevated wooden dock platform with industrial warehouses visible in the background. A large paddle steamer is moored in the river to the left. The character descends a slight ramp and steps onto the muddy shore at the segment's end.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow river shoreline with debris and wreckage

events.description: character enters shallow water at the river's edge

agents.ego_description: walking along the shoreline through shallow water, navigating around debris and wreckage

entered.detail: clear shallow river water with visible sandy and rocky bottom
small wooden rowboat washed up on the shore
wooden barrels and cargo containers scattered along the beach
weathered wooden pilings sticking up from the water
scattered driftwood and broken dock planks on the shore

segments.scene_description: The character walks through shallow river water along a debris-strewn shoreline. Beached rowboats, wooden barrels, and broken planks litter the sandy beach. Wooden posts emerge from the water, and the paddle steamer remains visible in the distance to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: active dock area with workers and loading equipment

events.description: dock workers become visible on the wooden platform ahead

agents.ego_description: approaching the wooden dock structure where workers are loading or unloading cargo

notable_agents.action: dock worker standing on the wooden platform near cargo
second worker near the warehouse entrance

entered.detail: low wooden dock platform with workers and cargo materials
sloped wooden ramp leading up to the main dock level

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the water onto muddy ground and approaches an active dock area. Two dock workers are visible on the wooden platform to the right. The industrial warehouse looms larger in the background as the character moves toward the loading area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an elevated industrial dock down to a debris-strewn shoreline and back onto a bustling loading wharf. It begins with the character walking along a wooden platform past large warehouses and a moored paddle steamer before descending a ramp onto the muddy bank. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts to a walk through shallow river water where beached rowboats, barrels, and broken planks litter the sandy beach. The camera then follows the character as they emerge from the water and approach an active dock area, where the industrial warehouse looms larger in the background. Finally, the movement concludes as the character nears a wooden platform occupied by dock workers in the loading zone.
